title: Transcriptomics of Bacillus thuringiensis Strain CT-43.
author: Wang Jieping Jieping Wang Han Mei Jin He
content: E-GEOD-39479 Transcriptomics of Bacillus thuringiensis Strain CT-43. RNA-seq of coding RNA EFO EFO_0003738 Bacillus thuringiensis We investigated the gene expression and metabolic regulatory mechanisms associated with the high-level accumulation of ICPs by performing the transcriptomics analysis
